author: Mr. Shuffleupagus
body:
A fan made a video BEFORE the Jonze video came out that looks a LOT like this one.  
It’s really interesting:  
[http://mrshuffleupagus.blogspot.com/2010/11/who-knows-where-thoughts-come-from-they.html](http://mrshuffleupagus.blogspot.com/2010/11/who-knows-where-thoughts-come-from-they.html)
